content:
{
  "mode": "method",
  "tests": [
    {
      "name": "test_navigation_to_my_profile",
      "input": ["navigate", "my_profile"],
      "output": "success",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates that the navigation to 'My Profile' works correctly."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_navigation_to_nonexistent_page",
      "input": ["navigate", "nonexistent_page"],
      "output": "error",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests the system's response to navigating to a page that does not exist."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_profile_data_load",
      "input": ["load_profile_data"],
      "output": "profile_data",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Checks if the profile data loads correctly after navigation."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_profile_update",
      "input": ["update_profile", {"name": "New Name"}],
      "output": "update_success",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Ensures that profile updates are processed correctly."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_navigation_with_invalid_token",
      "input": ["navigate", "my_profile", "invalid_token"],
      "output": "unauthorized",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests navigation with an invalid authentication token."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_profile_data_empty",
      "input": ["load_profile_data", {"user_id": "empty_user"}],
      "output": "no_data",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Checks the system's response when loading data for a user with no profile."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_navigation_to_settings",
      "input": ["navigate", "settings"],
      "output": "success",
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates that navigation to the settings page works correctly."
    },
    {
      "name": "test_profile_data_format",
      "input": ["load_profile_data"],
      "output": {"name": "string", "email": "string", "bio": "string"},
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Ensures that the profile data returned is in the correct format."
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": "User is authenticated and has a valid session.",
  "notes": "Tests should cover both normal and edge cases to ensure robustness."
}
